projects.name: BudgetBuddy
projects.description: BudgetBuddy is a modern, responsive personal finance application designed to help users track expenses, manage budgets, and gain insights into their spending habits.

projects.name: ColorOhm
projects.description: ColorOhm is a resistor color code calculator that converts color codes to resistance values and vice versa. Available as both a web app and a mobile app.

projects.name: SFMD
projects.tagline: Keeping firefighters safe with real-time monitoring.
projects.description: SFMD (Smart Firefighter Monitoring Device) is a wearable IoT device that monitors firefighter movement, location, and environmental conditions in real-time and displays data on a live dashboard. Won 2nd Prize in the Hardware Category at A-HACKS 2026 hackathon.

projects.name: AgriRover
projects.description: AgriRover is a multipurpose agriculture rover designed to assist in farming tasks. It features remote control, live camera feed, and environmental sensing capabilities.

projects.name: ZestFolio
projects.description: ZestFolio is a personal portfolio maker designed specifically for students. It allows users to create and showcase their portfolios easily. It is part of the ZestAcademy collaborative ecosystem.

projects.name: ZestAcademy
projects.description: ZestAcademy is an educational platform featuring articles, courses, news, and learning resources for students and developers.

projects.name: Zest Compiler
projects.description: Zest Compiler is an online multi-language compiler platform supporting C, Java, Python, HTML, SQL, and more. It is part of the ZestAcademy ecosystem.

projects.name: Project Mani
projects.tagline: The AI brain of RSMK Technologies.
projects.description: Project Mani is the centralized AI assistant ecosystem of RSMK Technologies. It powers intelligent chat across all RSMK websites using RAG and Groq AI.
